creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: tota
Date: Sun Jun 30 13:44:30 2013
New Revision: 322083
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322083

Log:
  - Update to 2.5.0 and unbreak
  - Transfer maintainership to ruby@
  - Add LICENSE section
  
  PR:		ports/179885
  Submitted by:	swills

Modified:
  head/net/rubygem-tweetstream/Makefile
  head/net/rubygem-tweetstream/distinfo

Modified: head/net/rubygem-tweetstream/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/rubygem-tweetstream/Makefile	Sun Jun 30 13:37:53 2013	(r322082)
+++ head/net/rubygem-tweetstream/Makefile	Sun Jun 30 13:44:30 2013	(r322083)
@@ -1,23 +1,21 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	rubygem-tweetstream
-# Date created:		2010-11-17
-# Whom:			TAKATSU Tomonari <tota@FreeBSD.org>
-#
+# Created by: TAKATSU Tomonari <tota@FreeBSD.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	tweetstream
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.4
+PORTVERSION=	2.5.0
 CATEGORIES=	net rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
-MAINTAINER=	tota@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	TweetStream provides simple Ruby access to Twitter\'s Streaming API
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-twitter-stream>=0.1.14:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-twitter-stream \
-		rubygem-daemons>=1.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-daemons \
-		rubygem-multi_json>=1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-multi_json
+LICENSE=	MIT
 
-BROKEN=		unable to resolve dependencies
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-daemons>=1.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-daemons \
+		rubygem-em-http-request>=1.0.2:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-em-http-request \
+		rubygem-em-twitter>=0.2:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-em-twitter \
+		rubygem-twitter>=4.5:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-twitter \
+		rubygem-yajl-ruby>=1.1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-yajl-ruby
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
 USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes

Modified: head/net/rubygem-tweetstream/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/rubygem-tweetstream/distinfo	Sun Jun 30 13:37:53 2013	(r322082)
+++ head/net/rubygem-tweetstream/distinfo	Sun Jun 30 13:44:30 2013	(r322083)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/tweetstream-1.1.4.gem) = 0ac848d072fce70f00023c684d6eb3f3fdd714dba9e519b07ffd00d03581b231
-SIZE (rubygem/tweetstream-1.1.4.gem) = 22528
+SHA256 (rubygem/tweetstream-2.5.0.gem) = 2fccbaf8be6ecc275655b82fb09675307890237294e5b1b9ec5c2b68bef292d7
+SIZE (rubygem/tweetstream-2.5.0.gem) = 27136
